articles.title: H5N1 bird flu confirmed in Australia for the first time, meaning virus has now reached every continent - Fox News
articles.description: Australia confirms its first case of H5N1 bird flu in a seabird near Esperance, Western Australia, meaning the virus has now reached every continent.
articles.content:
The first case of H5N1 bird flu has been confirmed in Australia, meaning the virus has now found its way to every continent.
